sessions.name: Solar Bitcoin Miner Build
sessions.description: Build a fully functional solar-powered solo Bitcoin miner from scratch. All parts included — ESP32 microcontroller, 18650 rechargeable battery, solar cell, and LCD display showing live mining stats. No experience needed.

sessions.name: Arduino Weather Station
sessions.description: Build your own desktop weather station with temperature, humidity, and atmospheric pressure readings. Features a custom OLED display with icons and trend arrows.

sessions.name: LED Matrix Art Display
sessions.description: Create a programmable 8x8 LED matrix art display. Learn basic programming to create animations, scrolling text, and custom pixel art that runs on battery power.

sessions.name: Raspberry Pi IoT Sensor
sessions.description: Build an IoT (Internet of Things) sensor that monitors your home and sends alerts to your phone. Learn the basics of Python and cloud connectivity.
